acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Node-scoped madobe remote output was created and cleaned up.
Portal ScreenCast stream selection was attempted.
Stream mapping to the madobe output is proven or blocked with evidence.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: pipewire-focused-after-portal-error-summary.json records no matching video/portal/madobe stream, and blocker.md records the remaining request-lifecycle/user-consent gap.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Direct named-output options are tested or documented.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: direct-grim-named-output-with-wayland-metadata.txt proves a bounded direct `grim -o` PNG capture.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: m2-capture-one-frame is not unblocked without required frame metadata.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: validation-summary.json and blocker.md explicitly keep m2-capture-one-frame blocked.

realWorldValidation.evidence: Live output creation, portal probing, direct grim capture, and cleanup evidence were collected on the reference Linux host. The proof node completed with a documented blocker rather than a capture-stream success claim.
